provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: Reconciliation: code merged in f343624; this task adds the missing offline restart smoke and the attested evidence bundle + reviewer artifacts the contract requires.

resolvedFindings.resolution: Attested evidence bundle authored with build/lint/tests/structural/smoke checks (hash-verified) and the three required reviewer artifacts linked.
The contract's smoke (message_cache_roundtrip) now exists and passes: messages survive a Db close + reopen of the same file with no realtime event.

findings.evidence: Evidence bundle status=pass with five attested checks (rust.build, lint, tests, structural, smoke) all exitCode 0; task-evidence-check --strict --verify-hashes passes. The restart smoke proves the feature's core claim (history survives relaunch) offline against the real SQLite store. Security + architecture reviewers pass; the plaintext-message-at-rest risk is recorded as accepted per ADR-0005.

summary: message-cache is honestly done after reconciliation. The persistence code (merged in f343624) keeps rusqlite confined to the store layer with deduped message/thread/attachment repositories, command persists on ingest + send and hydrates via load_history, and the DTOs carry no secrets. The previously-missing proof is now in place: an offline restart smoke shows threads + messages survive a full DB close/reopen with no realtime event, captured as attested, hash-verified evidence alongside passing security + architecture reviews. The plaintext-message-at-rest posture is the ADR-0005-accepted known risk. Pass.
